sentences.target: Je révise pour l'épreuve d'anglais de demain.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁeviz puʁ lepʁœv dɑ̃ɡlɛ də dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je révise pour l'épreuve d'anglais de demain.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁeviz puʁ lepʁœv dɑ̃ɡlɛ də dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm studying for tomorrow's English test.
translations.es: Estoy estudiando para el examen de inglés de mañana.
translations.de: Ich lerne für die Englischprüfung morgen.
translations.it: Sto studiando per l'esame di inglese di domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为明天的英语考试复习。
translations.yue: 我喺度為聽日嘅英文考試溫習。
translations.ru: Я готовлюсь к завтрашнему экзамену по английскому.
translations.pt: Estou estudando para a prova de inglês de amanhã.
translations.he: אני לומד למבחן האנגלית של מחר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang ôn cho bài kiểm tra tiếng Anh ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik leer voor de Engelse toets van morgen.
translations.uk: Я готуюся до завтрашнього іспиту з англійської.
translations.hi: मैं कल की अंग्रेज़ी परीक्षा की तैयारी कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Uczę się do jutrzejszego testu z angielskiego.
translations.el: Διαβάζω για το αυριανό τεστ αγγλικών.
translations.nb: Jeg leser til engelsktesten i morgen.
translations.id: Saya sedang belajar untuk ujian bahasa Inggris besok.
translations.ro: Învăț pentru testul de engleză de mâine.
translations.cs: Učím se na zítřejší test z angličtiny.
translations.da: Jeg læser til engelskprøven i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日の英語のテストに向けて勉強しています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; heads the clause.
Preposition introducing a purpose/goal complement.
Common noun (feminine singular) meaning ‘test/exam’, with elided definite article l’ (le/la); object of the preposition ‘pour’.
Noun meaning ‘English (language)’, preceded by elided preposition d’ (= de); noun complement specifying the subject matter of ‘épreuve’.
Preposition introducing a temporal post-nominal modifier.
Temporal noun use of ‘demain’ after ‘de’; complements ‘épreuve’ to mean ‘tomorrow’s’.

sentences.target: Tu as réussi l'épreuve de conduite.

translations.fr: Tu as réussi l'épreuve de conduite.
translations.pt: Você passou na prova de direção.
translations.vi: Bạn đã đậu kỳ thi lái xe.
translations.nl: Je bent geslaagd voor het rijexamen.
translations.hi: तुम ड्राइविंग टेस्ट पास कर गए.
translations.ja: 運転免許の試験に合格した。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (present, 2nd sg) forming the passé composé with the participle.
Past participle of the main verb; completes the compound past meaning ‘to pass/succeed (at)’.
Common noun (feminine singular) with elided definite article l’; direct object of ‘réussi’.
Preposition introducing a specifying complement.
Common noun (feminine) meaning ‘driving’; complements ‘épreuve’ to specify the type of test.

sentences.target: On commence l'épreuve dans cinq minutes.

translations.fr: On commence l'épreuve dans cinq minutes.
translations.en: We start the test in five minutes.
translations.es: Empezamos el examen en cinco minutos.
translations.de: Wir beginnen die Prüfung in fünf Minuten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们将在五分钟后开始考试。
translations.yue: 我哋五分鐘後開始考試。
translations.ru: Мы начнём экзамен через пять минут.
translations.pt: Começamos a prova em cinco minutos.
translations.he: אנחנו מתחילים את המבחן בעוד חמש דקות.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ bắt đầu bài kiểm tra trong năm phút nữa.
translations.nl: We beginnen de toets over vijf minuten.
translations.uk: Ми починаємо іспит через п’ять хвилин.
translations.hu: Öt perc múlva kezdjük a vizsgát.
translations.hi: हम पाँच मिनट में परीक्षा शुरू करेंगे.
translations.el: Ξεκινάμε το τεστ σε πέντε λεπτά.
translations.nb: Vi starter prøven om fem minutter.
translations.id: Kita mulai ujian dalam lima menit.
translations.sv: Vi börjar provet om fem minuter.
translations.da: Vi starter prøven om fem minutter.
translations.ja: 試験は5分後に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular), often used colloquially for ‘nous’.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and a temporal PP.
Common noun (feminine singular) with elided definite article l’; direct object of ‘commence’.
Preposition introducing a time-interval complement.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following time unit.
Common noun, plural; head of the measure phrase governed by ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Cette épreuve est dure pour nous.

translations.fr: Cette épreuve est dure pour nous.
translations.en: This challenge is hard for us.
translations.es: Este desafío es difícil para nosotros.
translations.de: Diese Herausforderung ist schwer für uns.
translations.it: Questa sfida è dura per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个挑战对我们来说很难。
translations.yue: 呢個挑戰對我哋嚟講好難。
translations.pt: Este desafio é difícil para nós.
translations.vi: Thử thách này khó đối với chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Deze uitdaging is zwaar voor ons.
translations.hi: यह चुनौती हमारे लिए कठिन है.
translations.pl: To wyzwanie jest dla nas trudne.
translations.el: Αυτή η πρόκληση είναι δύσκολη για εμάς.
translations.nb: Denne utfordringen er vanskelig for oss.
translations.sv: Denna utmaning är svår för oss.
translations.ro: Această provocare este grea pentru noi.
translations.cs: Tato výzva je pro nás těžká.
translations.da: Denne udfordring er svær for os.
translations.ja: この挑戦は私たちには難しい。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘épreuve’.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular agreeing with ‘épreuve’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/affected-party complement.
Stressed/disjunctive 1st person plural pronoun; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

We start the test in five minutes.
